title: epidendrum platystigma
intro: Epidendrum platystigma, also known as the yellow helmet orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum platystigma include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically made by steeping the plant's roots or leaves in hot water.
